reviews.comment:
Pasamos el 1ro de enero a eso de las 18hs y muy malos tratos por parte del empleado. No respondió ni al 'hola' que dijimos cuando entramos y encima se quería quedar con parte del vuelto, que si al menos hubieramos recibido buen trato se lo podíamos dejar de propina pero con el trato que tuvo.... (habían 2 empleados, fue el más delgado el de los malos tratos)

(Translated by Google)
We went there on January 1st around 6 pm and received very poor treatment from the employee. He didn't even respond to the 'hello' we said when we entered, and on top of that, he tried to keep part of the change. If we had at least received decent service, we could have left it as a tip, but with the way he treated us... (There were two employees; the thinner one was the one who was rude.)

reviewReply.comment: Le pedimos disculpa por la situación tomarnos medidas con el personal

reviews.comment:
Es la tercera vez que intento cargar nafta y no me quieren vender con la excusa de "la bomba no funciona por el calor" y me mandan a buscar nafta en bidones a una casa particular.
30/12 turno tarde

(Translated by Google)
This is the third time I've tried to get gas and they won't sell it to me, using the excuse that "the pump isn't working because of the heat," and they're telling me to get gas in jerrycans from a private house.

December 30th, afternoon shift

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes Fran el problema de las bombas no es excusa le pedimos disculpas por el inconveniente
